note: Tempdoc 599 §9.1/§9.5 — the ONE per-folder indexing-status derivation. A folder's truthful state (scanning/indexing/ready/failed/empty) is derived ONCE in `folderStatus` (state/folderStatus.ts) from the wire row's job counts; the Library row glyph + meta line CONSUME it. The raw per-folder count fields (`inFlightCount`/`failedCount`) may be read ONLY in the seam — a second shell-v0 site forming a folder ready/searchable verdict from them is the §8.1 false-terminal split re-introduced (a folder showing '✓ indexed' from somewhere other than job-drain). Mirrors check-verdict-derivation / check-search-issuance.
